steps: Go to https://tally.so and log in or create a free account
Click on your profile icon or name in the bottom-left corner and go to 'Settings'
Navigate to the 'Integrations' tab (or go directly to https://tally.so/settings/integrations)
Enter a name for the key and click 'Create'
Copy the generated API key — use it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Tally API key generated in Settings > Integrations. Used as a Bearer token.

notes: Tally has a generous free tier with unlimited forms and submissions
API access is currently available to all users including free tier
API keys are user-scoped — they access forms and submissions belonging to your account
The API currently supports reading forms and submissions, and deleting forms/submissions; creating/updating forms is not available via API
Rate limits apply; check the Tally developer docs for current limits

test_endpoint.description: List all forms in your account to verify the API key
